title: Afreximbank Visit Dangote Petroleum Refinery and Fertiliser - FinancialEDGE
description: President and Chairman of the African Export-Import Bank (Afreximbank) visit to Dangote Petroleum Refinery and Fertiliser in Lekki Lagos. Photo Caption: L-R, Wife of Cameroon Minister of Interior, Mrs. Yvonne Atanga, President and Chairman of the African Export-Import Bank (Afreximbank) Dr. George Elombi; Chairman Dafric Global Resources, Alhaji Tajudeen Aminu Dantata; President/CE, Dangote Industries Limited,
html:
President and Chairman of the African Export-Import Bank (Afreximbank) visit to Dangote Petroleum Refinery and Fertiliser in Lekki Lagos.

 

Photo Caption: L-R, Wife of Cameroon Minister of Interior, Mrs. Yvonne Atanga, President and Chairman of the African Export-Import Bank (Afreximbank) Dr. George Elombi; Chairman Dafric Global Resources, Alhaji Tajudeen Aminu Dantata; President/CE, Dangote Industries Limited, Aliko Dangote; during the President and Chairman of the African Export-Import Bank (Afreximbank) visit to Dangote Petroleum Refinery and Fertiliser in Lekki Lagos on Monday December 22, 2025.
